label: Transparent lilac panicle motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lilac transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated lilac panicle botanical motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A real Syringa vulgaris lilac panicle with unmistakable lilac-purple color: one full conical cluster of many tiny four-petaled blossoms in soft lilac, mauve, and pale violet-purple hues (#a77bc5, #c5a4dc, #d8c4ea), a few darker violet unopened buds, one slender woody-green stem, and two matte heart-shaped leaf-green leaves near the base. It must clearly read as lilac, not lavender spikes, not wisteria, not grayscale flowers, not generic purple flowers.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; show the full panicle tip, stem, and leaves without cropping; elegant nostalgic botanical archive silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light preserving visible lilac-purple blossoms, leaf-green foliage, spring-grey petal shadows, and natural botanical detail.
Chroma-key workflow: create the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff cyan chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff, cyan, teal, or blue-green anywhere in the subject. Remove the key locally with remove_chroma_key.py using auto-key border, soft matte, and despill. The final motif.png is RGBA transparent with transparent corners.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no ribbon, no garden background, no bouquet wrap, no field, no second flower species, no shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no monochrome flowers.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Lilac", derived from the provided transparent lilac panicle motif: conical lilac-purple blossoms, mauve buds, heart-shaped leaf-green leaves, woody stem, spring-grey petal shadows, and nostalgic botanical archive mood.
Reference use: Treat the lilac panicle motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from lilac-purple petals, mauve buds, leaf green, woody stem, soft spring grey, aged paper neutrals, archive label borders, and garden specimen catalogues.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, at least 2400px wide if constrained.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board; large readable section labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: header "Lilac Design System" and "Nostalgic archive system"; Palette; Typography; Japanese Typography; Components; Navigation; Dashboard/Data; Forms; Table; Command/Search; Status States; Texture; Radius; Spacing; Shadow; Tokens; Asset Examples.
Palette swatches: Lilac Purple, Pale Petal, Mauve Bud, Leaf Green, Spring Grey, Archive Paper, Stem Umber, Ink Plum, Pressed Shadow. Show short readable hex-style labels.
Typography guidance: English and Japanese examples, with labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, Archive Note, 日本語.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn style with 8px card radius, lilac primary buttons, leaf-green secondary/support, spring-grey muted surfaces, paper cards, visible focus rings, badges, alerts, tabs, checkbox, radio, switch, selects, textarea, inputs.
Navigation and dashboard/data: archive sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, command palette, search input, botanical accession table, metric cards, line/bar charts, progress, pagination.
Status states: success, warning, destructive, empty state, error state, loading skeleton using motif-derived colors.
Texture and tokens: subtle lilac-petal grain, pressed botanical paper, faint panicle dot pattern, archive rule lines, spacing scale, radius scale, shadow scale, semantic token chips.
Asset examples: small motif cutout preview, texture tile, app panel preview, token chips.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography samples. Ensure "Lilac", "Nostalgic archive", "Typography", "日本語", "Palette", "Command", "Table", and "Tokens" are legible.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock UI kit, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Lilac, no lavender spikes, no wisteria racemes, no dark-mode board in this image.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one separate high-resolution 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for the same Morphous theme named "Lilac". It must feel like the light Lilac design-system board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the provided transparent lilac panicle motif and the light Lilac design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, nostalgic archive component language, component coverage, spacing, typography, archive label borders, lilac panicle texture, and botanical specimen catalog mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, at least 2400px wide if constrained.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board; large readable section labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: header "Lilac Dark Mode" and "Nostalgic archive system"; Palette; Typography; Japanese Typography; Components; Navigation; Dashboard/Data; Forms; Table; Command/Search; Status States; Texture; Radius; Spacing; Shadow; Tokens; Asset Examples.
Dark palette: deep ink plum and archive charcoal surfaces, lilac-purple highlights, pale petal text, mauve bud accents, leaf-green success/support, spring-grey muted borders, stem umber dividers, pressed shadow depth, archive paper only as small highlight chips. Keep colors faithful to lilac, not neon purple.
Typography guidance: readable English and Japanese examples, with labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, Archive Note, 日本語.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn style with 8px card radius, dark cards and popovers, lilac primary buttons, leaf-green secondary/support, spring-grey muted controls, visible focus rings, badges, alerts, tabs, checkbox, radio, switch, selects, textarea, inputs.
Navigation and dashboard/data: dark archive sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, command palette, search input, botanical accession table, metric cards, line/bar charts, progress, pagination.
Status states: success, warning, destructive, empty state, error state, loading skeleton using motif-derived colors.
Texture and tokens: subtle lilac-petal grain, pressed botanical paper texture translated to dark surfaces, faint panicle dot pattern, archive rule lines, spacing scale, radius scale, shadow scale, semantic token chips.
Asset examples: small motif cutout preview, dark texture tile, app panel preview, token chips.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography samples. Ensure "Lilac", "Dark Mode", "Nostalgic archive", "Typography", "日本語", "Palette", "Command", "Table", and "Tokens" are legible.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Lilac, no lavender spikes, no wisteria racemes, no light-mode board in this image.
